summary: Sports activity app with EventsScreen that auto-filters events based on active sport via SportContext (sportStatus/currentSport). Map also auto-filters by active sport. Built incrementally in numbered blocks.
architectural_notes: SportContext provides sportStatus and currentSport; used to drive auto-filtering across screens (Map, Events)
EventsScreen uses useEffect on [sportStatus, currentSport] to sync selectedSport filter state

existing_features.title: In EventsPage.tsx, import useEffect and useState from React, and import useSport from the SportContext. Consume sportStatus and currentSport from useSport().

In EventsPage.tsx, keep the existing selectedSport state (defaulting to 'All') and add a useEffect that sets selectedSport to currentSport when sportStatus === 'active' && currentSport is truthy, otherwise resets selectedSport to 'All'. The effect must depend on [sportStatus, currentSport].

In EventsPage.tsx, derive a filteredEvents list from the events array: when selectedSport === 'All', filteredEvents equals the full events array; otherwise, filteredEvents is events filtered to those where event.sport === selectedSport. Render filteredEvents in place of the raw events array.

Verify end-to-end behavior: (1) deactivating a sport resets the Events list to show all events; (2) activating a sport (e.g. Tennis) causes the Events list to automatically show only events for that sport; (3) manually selecting 'All' via the filter chips still shows all events; (4) deactivating after a manual selection keeps the list at 'All'.

new_feature_requests.summary: EventsScreen auto-filters to currentSport when sportStatus is active, shows All when inactive
